$comment: C11/C23 6.4.5 honest-deferral witness: u"😀" (U+1F600, raw astral, NO \u escape) needs a UTF-16 surrogate PAIR, which is a LATER cycle. The CST→HIR lowering FAILS LOUD with H_WideCharSurrogateUnsupported (an unsuppressable code) rather than silently truncating to a wrong 16-bit unit. u"…" is always U16 (format-independent), so the reject is target-independent. Red-on-disable: drop the wide-opener fail-loud in lowerStringLiteral and this compiles (emitting a wrong/garbage unit) instead of erroring. The load-bearing pin is the CODE + a rejected compile at the literal's position.
